answers.where: Hangar on a bright Roblox-like textured studs floor with the main Assault Walker centered and a second sourced Sentinel Mech displayed on a side pad.
answers.action: Inspect the main mech and the new side-pad Sentinel display, then press Battle.
answers.response: The hangar now includes a second ready-made mech source model instead of relying only on procedural block props around the hero.
answers.reward: The world now has a visible path toward collectible/rival/shop mech variety using permissive internet assets.
answers.game_look: Two sourced mech silhouettes, studs floor, blocky toy props, readable engine-font HUD, saturated colors, and a clear Battle button push the scene closer to a Roblox-like mech showroom.

issues.text: The new Sentinel is a real downloaded CC-BY mech asset and reads as a second showroom/rival mech, but it is still a static display without authored animation, damage states, or final attribution UI.
